metric_name: Q4 2003 PC music holiday push prediction
metric_value: I would be surprised if a major PC company was not offering a music service towards the critical Christmas buying season in the fourth quarter
notes: Kastner verbatim — Aberdeen chief research officer

metric_value: With Apple shooting off the starting gun the rest of the year will be a catch-up scramble to get product to market and grab Windows PC market share at all costs
Legal dispute that threatened to derail Gateway's groundbreaking plan to load music on its computers has been quietly resolved
Catch-up scramble to grab Windows PC market share
notes: Kastner's framing assumed PC-bundled music would be share-shifting — instead Apple's iPod/iTunes drove its own halo
